attributes.Sql Query:
SELECT 
WSATDR.SALES_CREDIT_ASSGN_APPLD_KEY,  
WSATDR.REBOK_CHANNEL_FLG,             
WSATDR.SRC_RPTD_REBOK_OTM_TERR_ID_INT,
WSATDR.SRC_RPTD_REBOK_OTM_TERR_NAME,  
WSATDR.SRC_RPTD_REBOK_OTM_TERR_TYP_CD,
WSATDR.SK_TRX_SC_ID_INT,              
WSATDR.PD_ASSIGNMENT_MODE_CD,         
WSATDR.PD_SCAA_CREATION_DT,           
WSATDR.PD_SALES_CREDIT_TYPE_CD,       
WSATDR.PD_SALES_REP_NUM,              
WSATDR.PD_SALES_TERRITORY_KEY,        
WSATDR.PD_SALES_ORDER_LINE_KEY,       
WSATDR.PD_SALES_COMMISSION_PCT,       
WSATDR.PD_SCA_SOURCE_TYPE_CD,         
WSATDR.PD_SS_CD,                      
WSATDR.PD_CREATED_BY_ERP_USER_NAME,   
WSATDR.BK_SLS_CRDT_ASGNMNT_REASON_CD, 
WSATDR.PD_SLS_CREDIT_LAST_UPDATE_DTM,
WSATDR.PD_SLS_CREDIT_UNALLOCATED_FLG ,
WSATDR.PD_SALES_CREDIT_USAGE_CD,      
WSATDR.EDW_CREATE_DTM,                
WSATDR.EDW_CREATE_USER,               
WSATDR.EDW_UPDATE_DTM,                
WSATDR.EDW_UPDATE_USER  ,
WSATDR.START_TV_DTM,
WSATDR.END_TV_DTM,
WSATDR.UCRM_CASE_NUM            
FROM $$WORKDB.W_SCA_APLD_TRX_DIRECT_REBOK WSATDR
WHERE WSATDR.DML_TYPE='I'
AND NOT EXISTS
(SELECT 1 FROM $$SLSORDVWDB.N_SCA_APLD_TRX_DIRECT_REBOK_TV NSATDRT
WHERE NSATDRT.SALES_CREDIT_ASSGN_APPLD_KEY   = WSATDR.SALES_CREDIT_ASSGN_APPLD_KEY)
